overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night during heavy rainfall. The footage showcases neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective streets with ray-traced lighting, and transitions from open sidewalks to covered industrial underpasses. This is clearly high-end game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring atmospheric rain and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon commercial signage

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers against the rainy night sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk, glancing up at the illuminated towers

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the wet multi-lane road

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign with 'STEVE' illuminated in cyan and red letters on building facade
tall futuristic glass building with grid-patterned illuminated windows rising into the rain
rain-soaked dark concrete sidewalk with yellow tactile paving strips reflecting neon lights
tall black pole with bright white linear LED light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-drenched futuristic city street at night. The camera moves forward along a wet sidewalk lined with yellow tactile paving, passing beneath a prominent cyan and red neon 'STEVE' sign. Around 10 seconds, the view tilts upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers disappearing into the rainy darkness, their windows glowing with warm light against the cool neon atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass

events.description: entering covered area beneath large overhead bridge structure with orange neon lighting
moving deeper into underpass where artificial lighting becomes dimmer and more industrial

agents.ego_description: continuing walk under the massive overpass, passing industrial structural columns and green-lit digital signs

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overhead transit bridge with orange neon strip lighting running underneath
dark corrugated metal wall with industrial piping, green paint accents, and ventilation grates
black cylindrical pole with green illuminated digital display showing scrolling text

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive transit overpass. The orange neon strips lining the bridge underside cast a warm glow on the wet pavement below. Industrial metal walls with green accents line the left side while digital signposts display green text. The rain continues but is partially blocked by the overhead structure, creating a sheltered corridor effect.

events.description: emerging from underpass back to open street with wider view of intersection and traffic
slight right turn while continuing forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass tunnel and continuing along the open street, approaching a busy intersection with moving traffic

notable_agents.action: multiple cars with headlights on driving through the wet intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall vertical digital advertisement screen on building facade displaying illuminated imagery
wide multi-lane intersection with yellow crosswalk markings and traffic signals
low concrete wall with metal rail separating pedestrian walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment emerges from the underpass back into the open rainy cityscape. Large digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street while the camera approaches a wide intersection with moderate vehicle traffic. The wet asphalt reflects the myriad lights from street lamps, vehicle headlights, and neon signage. The walk continues along the sidewalk bordered by a concrete barrier, with futuristic glass buildings rising on both sides of the multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk street that moves from open neon vistas into a sheltered industrial underpass before emerging back into a bustling urban intersection. It begins on a wet sidewalk lined with yellow tactile paving, passing beneath a cyan and red neon sign before tilting upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers disappearing into the dark, rainy sky. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive transit overpass, where orange neon strips and green industrial accents create a sheltered corridor of warm light. The scene then opens back into the rainy cityscape, passing large digital billboards as the camera approaches a wide intersection filled with vehicle traffic. Finally, the walk continues along a concrete barrier, with the wet asphalt reflecting a myriad of headlights and neon signs from the futuristic glass buildings lining the multi-lane road.
